allow: PowerShell(php artisan storage:link; php artisan route:list --name=menus; php artisan route:list --name=categories)
PowerShell(php artisan view:cache; php artisan view:clear)

PowerShell(php artisan tinker --execute="auth\(\)->login\(App\\Models\\User::where\('role','admin'\)->first\(\)\); \\$html = app\(App\\Http\\Controllers\\MenuController::class\)->index\(new Illuminate\\Http\\Request\)->render\(\); echo 'MENU INDEX OK, length='.strlen\(\\$html\).PHP_EOL; \\$html2 = app\(App\\Http\\Controllers\\CategoryController::class\)->index\(new Illuminate\\Http\\Request\)->render\(\); echo 'CATEGORY INDEX OK, length='.strlen\(\\$html2\).PHP_EOL; \\$html3 = app\(App\\Http\\Controllers\\MenuController::class\)->create\(\)->render\(\); echo 'MENU CREATE OK, length='.strlen\(\\$html3\).PHP_EOL; \\$html4 = app\(App\\Http\\Controllers\\CategoryController::class\)->create\(\)->render\(\); echo 'CATEGORY CREATE OK, length='.strlen\(\\$html4\).PHP_EOL;")
PowerShell(php artisan route:list --name=tables; php artisan view:cache; php artisan view:clear)
PowerShell(php artisan route:list --name=kitchen; php artisan view:cache; php artisan view:clear)
PowerShell(php artisan route:list --name=dashboard; php artisan view:cache; php artisan view:clear)
PowerShell(php artisan route:list --name=transactions; php artisan view:cache; php artisan view:clear)
PowerShell(php artisan route:list --name=reports; php artisan view:cache; php artisan view:clear)
